parameters.$filter: (SettingName eq 'KillSwitch' or SettingName eq 'IsRunning') and SettingValue eq 'true'

parameters.item/Summary: "Skipped due to active lock or kill switch"

parameters.$filter: Timestamp ge '@{addHours(utcNow(), -1)}' and (EventType eq 'ActionExecuted' or EventType eq 'ToolCalled' or EventType eq 'TaskCompleted')

thoughts.description: The agent's reasoning during the heartbeat.

mcpActionsTaken.description: List of MCP Graph queries executed (e.g., 'Checked Calendar', 'Sent Teams Message').

memoryUpdateSummary.description: A concise summary to be logged in the SharePoint Memory List.

parameters.item/Summary: Agent executed (may have sent emails/done work) but response was not valid JSON. See FullContextJSON for raw output.

definition.description: Create a trigger to automatically call your copilot repeatedly
